ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee left the organization (if applicable) */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's manager */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location or office of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_position FOREIGN KEY ("position") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the network metric record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "polarity" INTEGER /* Polarity score of the employee */,
  "polarity_normalized" REAL /* Normalized polarity score */,
  "polarity_sentence" INTEGER /* Polarity score of the employee's sentences */,
  "polarity_sentence_normalized" REAL /* Normalized polarity score of the employee's sentences */,
  "connections" INTEGER /* Number of connections the employee has */,
  "connections_normalized" REAL /* Normalized number of connections */,
  "interactions" INTEGER /* Number of interactions the employee has */,
  "interactions_normalized" REAL /* Normalized number of interactions */,
  "degree" INTEGER /* Degree of the employee in the network */,
  "degree_normalized" REAL /* Normalized degree */,
  "centrality" REAL /* Centrality score of the employee */,
  "centrality_normalized" REAL /* Normalized centrality score */,
  "betweenness" REAL /* Betweenness score of the employee */,
  "betweenness_normalized" REAL /* Normalized betweenness score */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Engagement score of the employee */,
  "influence_score" REAL /* Influence score of the employee */,
  "clustering_coefficient" REAL /* Clustering coefficient of the employee */,
  "community_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community or cluster the employee belongs to */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metrics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_metrics_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communications" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication record */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sender */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the receiver */,
  "communication_date" TEXT /* Date of the communication */,
  "communication_type" TEXT /* Type of communication (e.g., email, chat) */,
  "communication_content" TEXT /* Content of the communication */,
  "communication_channel" TEXT /* Specific channel used for communication (e.g., email, Slack, Teams) */,
  "communication_length" INTEGER /* Length of the communication content in characters */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment analysis score of the communication content */,
  "sentiment_category" TEXT /* Category of sentiment (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "attachment_count" INTEGER /* Number of attachments in the communication */,
  "communication_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the communication (for calls or meetings) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_communication_type FOREIGN KEY ("communication_type") REFERENCES communication_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "project_leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project leader */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost incurred for the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "project_scope" TEXT /* Scope of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_leader_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES project_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_members" (
  "project_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the project member record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee in the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the employee joined the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the employee left the project */,
  "contribution_score" REAL /* Score indicating the employee's contribution to the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the employee's involvement in the project (e.g., active, on hold, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_members_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_members_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_members_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES employee_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department head */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the department */,
  "current_projects" INTEGER /* Number of current projects the department is involved in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "hierarchy_level" INTEGER /* Level of the position in the organizational hierarchy */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* Detailed responsibilities of the position */,
  "required_skills" TEXT /* Skills required for the position */,
  "reporting_to" INTEGER /* ID of the position to which this position reports */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_reporting_to FOREIGN KEY ("reporting_to") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communication_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the communication type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the communication type */,
  "communication_channels" TEXT /* List of communication channels supported by this type */,
  "average_length" INTEGER /* Average length of communications of this type */,
  "average_frequency" INTEGER /* Average frequency of communications of this type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the project status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project status */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project status */,
  "next_steps" TEXT /* Next steps required for the project to progress */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* Detailed responsibilities of the role */,
  "required_skills" TEXT /* Skills required for the role */,
  "reporting_to" INTEGER /* ID of the role to which this role reports */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_roles_reporting_to FOREIGN KEY ("reporting_to") REFERENCES employee_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the employee (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "access_granted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who granted the access */,
  "access_granted_date" TEXT /* Date when the access was granted */,
  "access_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the access will expire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES employee_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_access_granted_by FOREIGN KEY ("access_granted_by") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session (for login and logout) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
